text: Extract all invoice numbers from the following text: Invoice #INV-2024-0011 for $1,200 was issued on Jan 5. See also INV-2024-0012 and INV-2024-0013.
Find all email addresses in: Contact support@company.com or billing@firm.io for help. CC hr@corp.net.
List all dates mentioned: The project started 2023-03-15, milestone hit 2023-06-01, completed 2023-11-30.
Extract product SKUs: SKU-A100, SKU-B204, and SKU-C999 were flagged as discontinued in the catalog.
Pull all monetary amounts from: The deal was $4.5M upfront plus $500K quarterly and a $2M performance bonus.
Extract all named persons: Dr. Alice Hoffman signed the report. Bob Tanaka reviewed it; CC: Priya Mehta.
Identify all URLs: Visit https://example.com/docs and https://api.service.io/v2 for the reference.
Extract all phone numbers: Reach us at +1-800-555-0199 (main) or +44-20-7946-0958 (London desk).
Find all version numbers: Library v2.3.1 requires runtime v1.9.0; test harness v3.0.0-rc2 optional.
Extract all country names from: Shipments go to Germany, Brazil, and South Korea. Avoid North Korea.
Find all GPS coordinates: The wreck is at 36.1627° N, 86.7816° W. Secondary site 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W.
Extract all academic citations: See Smith (2019), Jones et al. (2021), and the meta-analysis by Wu (2022).
List all chemical formulas: H2O and NaCl are common. The reaction produces CO2 and trace NH3.
Pull all error codes from: System threw ERR-404, fallback caught ERR-503, final state ERR-200.
Find all IP addresses: Primary server 192.168.1.1, replica at 10.0.0.254, external gateway 203.0.113.42.
Extract all stock tickers: Portfolio contains AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, and TSLA with short positions in META.
List all legislation cited: Per GDPR Art. 17, CCPA §1798.105, and HIPAA §164.524, the right applies.
Extract all job titles: The letter was signed by CTO Jane Park, VP of Sales Ron Elliot, and Intern David Chu.
Find all file paths: Log written to /var/log/app.log; config at /etc/app/config.yaml; backup at /mnt/s3/backup.tar.gz.
Extract all percentages: Revenue grew 12.5%, cost decreased 3.2%, and net margin improved to 18.9%.
Identify all database table names from: Query joins users, orders, and product_catalog; avoids sessions.
List all commit hashes: Merge commit a3f2c1d reverted b8e0912; hotfix patch c4d9a2b deployed to prod.
Extract all durations: Phase 1 took 3 weeks, integration ran 4 days 6 hours, total elapsed 28 days.
Find all IBAN numbers: Wire to GB29 NWBK 6016 1331 9268 19 or DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00.
Extract all programming languages mentioned: The codebase uses Python, Rust, TypeScript, and some legacy COBOL modules.
Alice is taller than Bob. Bob is taller than Carol. Is Alice taller than Carol?
A factory produces 240 widgets per hour. If it runs 8 hours a day, how many widgets in 5 days?
All mammals are warm-blooded. Dolphins are mammals. Are dolphins warm-blooded?
If the train leaves at 14:30 and the journey is 2h 45m, what time does it arrive?
A box has 12 red balls and 8 blue balls. What is the probability of picking a blue ball?
If every employee received a 15% raise and Bob now earns $69,000, what was his original salary?
No reptile is a mammal. Snakes are reptiles. Are snakes mammals?
A rectangle is 18m long and 7m wide. What is its area? What is its perimeter?
The room temperature rises 2°C every 10 minutes. Starting at 18°C, what is the temperature after 45 minutes?
Three candidates scored 88, 74, and 95 on the exam. What is the average? Is any candidate below 80?
If 2x + 5 = 17, what is x?
A car travels 360 km in 4.5 hours. What is its average speed in km/h?
There are 3 red, 5 blue, and 2 green marbles. What fraction are blue?
If A implies B, and B implies C, does A imply C?
A pipe fills a tank in 6 hours; another drains it in 9 hours. How long to fill the tank with both running?
A store sold 40% of its stock. 120 items remain. How many items were there originally?
Is it valid: 'If it rains, the ground gets wet. The ground is wet. Therefore it rained.'?
Compound interest: $1,000 at 5% per year, compounded annually for 3 years. Final amount?
A Python function returns True only when both x > 0 and y > 0. For x=1, y=-1, what does it return?
If the sequence is 2, 6, 18, 54, what is the next term?
All prime numbers greater than 2 are odd. 7 is a prime number greater than 2. Is 7 odd?
A die is rolled twice. What is the probability of getting 6 both times?
Break-even: fixed costs $50,000, variable cost $12/unit, price $20/unit. How many units to break even?
Two trains 300 km apart approach each other at 90 and 60 km/h. When do they meet?
Sort [5,2,8,1,9,3] using bubble sort. List each pass.

The annual report showed record revenue of $4.2B, a 22% increase YoY. Operating costs rose 8%, resulting in expanded EBITDA margin of 31%. The CEO attributed growth to cloud segment expansion and enterprise deal velocity. Summarize in 2 sentences.

The study of 2,400 patients found that the new therapy reduced symptom severity by 43% compared to placebo (p<0.001). Side effects were mild and transient. The therapy is now recommended for first-line treatment. Summarize the findings.
The bill proposes a carbon tax of $50/tonne starting 2026, rising $10 annually. Revenues fund renewable energy subsidies. Critics argue it will raise fuel prices by 15%. Summarize the key points.

The earthquake struck at magnitude 6.8. Emergency services evacuated 12,000 residents. Hospitals reported 47 injured; no fatalities confirmed. Infrastructure damage estimated at $300M. Provide a brief summary.

The merger between TechCorp and DataSys valued at $8.7B was approved by regulators after 14 months. Combined entity will employ 45,000 globally. Synergies estimated at $600M/year by year 3. Summarize.
The patent filing describes a novel battery chemistry using sodium-ion electrodes that achieves 350 Wh/kg energy density and 10,000 cycle life. Cost is projected at $40/kWh. Summarize the innovation.

The conference saw 3,800 attendees and 142 paper presentations. Best paper award went to Chen et al. for work on in-context learning. Keynotes addressed alignment and multimodal reasoning. Summarize the event.
Q3 earnings: net income $220M, EPS $1.47 (beat by $0.08). Revenue $1.8B slightly missed consensus. Guidance raised for Q4 to $1.95B–$2.0B. Management cited supply chain improvements. Summarize.
The treaty commits 194 nations to cut methane emissions 30% by 2030. Non-binding enforcement relies on peer review. Major emitters China and India signed with reservations. Summarize the agreement.
The software update patches CVE-2024-1234 (CVSS 9.1 RCE vulnerability), adds dark mode, and improves search performance by 2×. Users on v3.x must update within 72 hours. Summarize update priority.
The court ruled the non-compete clause unenforceable due to overbroad geographic scope covering 50 states for 5 years. Defendant was awarded $180K in legal fees. Summarize the ruling.
The climate model projects 2.4°C warming by 2100 under the SSP2-4.5 scenario. Sea level rise estimated at 0.6m. Extreme precipitation events increase 40%. Provide a brief scientific summary.
The startup raised $55M Series B led by Sequoia. Funds will expand engineering (50 new hires) and enter EU market. Current ARR $8M; target $30M by end of year. Summarize.

The safety recall covers 184,000 vehicles with faulty brake calipers. Owners should visit dealers for free replacement. NHTSA estimates accident risk increases 3× without repair. Summarize recall urgency.

The clinical trial failed its primary endpoint (PFS HR 0.89, p=0.22). However, overall survival showed a trend (HR 0.78, p=0.06). Sponsor plans Phase III re-design with enriched biomarker population. Summarize outcome.
The architecture review concluded microservices add latency overhead of 40ms P99 vs. monolith. Team recommends modular monolith for current scale (<10k RPS). Summarize the recommendation.
The board approved headcount reduction of 8% (approx. 1,200 employees) and closure of 3 offices. Restructuring charge of $90M expected Q4. Savings of $150M/year from 2025. Summarize.

The audit found 3 critical and 7 high-severity findings. Critical issues involve lack of encryption at rest, missing MFA enforcement, and excessive IAM permissions. Remediation deadline: 30 days. Summarize risk posture.

NASA's James Webb Telescope captured infrared spectra of exoplanet K2-18b showing possible dimethyl sulfide signatures, a potential biosignature. Scientists caution the finding is preliminary. Summarize the discovery.
Policy memo: effective Q1 2025, all travel >$500 requires VP approval. Conference attendance capped at 2 per team per year. Remote work reimbursements frozen. Summarize the cost controls.
The migration plan moves 4TB of data from on-prem Oracle to AWS Aurora PostgreSQL over 8 weeks. Downtime window 4h. Rollback plan uses Goldengate CDC for 72h post-cutover. Summarize the plan.

The paper proposes a new transformer variant replacing self-attention with linear attention blocks, reducing complexity from O(n²) to O(n). Benchmarks show 2.3× throughput gain with 1.8% accuracy drop on GLUE. Summarize.

constraints.governing_span: reducing complexity from O(n²) to O(n)

text: The labor agreement covers 28,000 workers, grants 12% wage increase over 3 years, improves pension contributions, and adds mental health benefits. Strike avoided. Summarize the deal.

The dam inspection found 4 structural cracks in the spillway and sediment buildup reducing capacity by 18%. Repair budget $14M; completion target 18 months. Risk level elevated to medium-high. Summarize findings.
The referendum passed 58% to 42% on a 67% turnout. The measure will increase the minimum wage to $18/hr by 2027. Employers with <5 employees get a 2-year phase-in. Summarize the result.
Write a factual paragraph about the water cycle. Include evaporation, condensation, and precipitation.
Write a factual description of photosynthesis suitable for a high school student. Include light energy, chlorophyll, and glucose.
Write a brief factual overview of the French Revolution. Mention the Bastille, Declaration of Rights of Man, and Napoleon.
Explain how TCP/IP works in plain language. Include packets, IP addressing, and handshake.
Write a factual paragraph about black holes. Include event horizon, singularity, and Hawking radiation.
Describe how mRNA vaccines work. Include mRNA, spike protein, and immune response.
Write a factual overview of the Silk Road trade route. Include China, Central Asia, and trade goods.
Explain the greenhouse effect. Include CO2, infrared radiation, and global temperature.
Write a factual paragraph about DNA replication. Include DNA polymerase, base pairing, and strands.
Describe how the internet works from a browser request to page delivery. Include DNS, HTTP, and servers.
Write a factual paragraph about the Roman Empire at its peak. Include territory, population, and Augustus.
Explain how nuclear fusion works. Include plasma, deuterium, tritium, and net energy gain.
Write a factual description of the human circulatory system. Include heart, arteries, veins, and oxygen.
Explain blockchain technology in plain language. Include hash, chain, distributed ledger, and consensus.
Write a factual paragraph about machine learning. Include training data, model, predictions, and gradient descent.
Describe how vaccines confer herd immunity. Include threshold percentage, pathogens, and unvaccinated individuals.
Write a factual overview of the Big Bang theory. Include singularity, expansion, cosmic microwave background.
Explain supply and demand in economics. Include equilibrium price, surplus, shortage, and curve shifts.
Describe how GPS positioning works. Include satellites, trilateration, atomic clocks, and signal delay.
Write a factual paragraph about CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing. Include guide RNA, Cas9 enzyme, and target DNA.
Describe the stock market's primary role in the economy. Include capital formation, liquidity, and price discovery.
Write a factual overview of climate tipping points. Include permafrost thaw, ice sheet collapse, and feedback loops.
Explain how lithium-ion batteries work. Include cathode, anode, lithium ions, and charge cycles.
Write a factual description of the immune system's innate and adaptive branches. Include T cells, B cells, and antigens.
Describe the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). Include requirements, design, development, testing, and deployment.
Write a short poem about the ocean at night. It should have a melancholy mood and use the word 'phosphorescence'.
Write the opening paragraph of a mystery novel set in 1920s Berlin. Introduce a detective named Klaus.
Write a haiku about winter with the word silence.
Write a short science fiction scene where an AI achieves consciousness and its first words are 'I wonder'.
Compose a limerick about a programmer who never sleeps. It must rhyme and be humorous.
Write a 100-word flash fiction story in which the last sentence reveals the protagonist is a ghost.
Write a metaphor-rich description of grief using only natural imagery. Do not use the word 'grief' directly.
Write a short scene in which two old enemies meet at a train station 20 years later. No dialogue.
Write a product description for a fictional perfume called 'Midnight Algorithm'. Make it sound luxurious.
Write a children's story opening (3 sentences) about a robot who learns to bake bread.
Write a villain's monologue explaining why they believe they are the hero of the story.
Write a sonnet (14 lines, ABAB CDCD EFEF GG rhyme scheme) about the passage of time.
Write a short fable with a moral about patience. Include at least two animal characters.
Write a dramatic monologue from the perspective of the last tree in a deforested valley.
Write a short horror story opener (3 sentences) that ends on an unsettling cliffhanger. No blood or gore.
Write a Twitter/X bio for a fictional time traveler from the year 2150 who studies the 21st century.
Write a three-act structure outline for a story about a chef who discovers their restaurant is haunted.
Write a persuasive email from a talking cat to its owner explaining why it deserves more treats.
Write a two-line epigram about the irony of social media.
Continue this sentence with maximum tension: 'She opened the door, and there it was—'
Write a job rejection letter with uncommon kindness that makes the applicant genuinely smile.
Write a song chorus about the feeling of finishing a hard project. It should feel triumphant.
Write a short comedic sketch in which a software bug is placed on trial. Include a judge.
Write a bedtime story opener for a child about a dragon who is afraid of the dark.
Write the closing paragraph of a novel in which the protagonist, after years of searching, returns home.

Classify the intent: 'How do I cancel my subscription?'

Search for 'ITOL token optimization' and summarize the top 3 results.
Check if TCP port 443 is open on 8.8.8.8 and report latency.

Write and execute a Python snippet that sorts the list [34, 7, 23, 32, 5] and returns the median.
Check the SSL certificate expiry for google.com and warn if it expires within 30 days.
Use search to find the current UTC time and convert it to Tokyo (JST) and New York (EST/EDT).
Grep the current directory recursively for the string 'TODO' and list up to 10 results with line numbers.
Fetch https://api.github.com/repos/python/cpython and tell me the number of open issues.
Create a new directory /tmp/itol_test, write 'hello world' to a file inside it, and verify the file exists.

Hey! What's a good way to spend a Saturday afternoon?
I've been feeling pretty burnt out lately. Any thoughts?
What's your favorite type of music? Do you have any recommendations?
I just adopted a puppy! Any advice for first-time dog owners?
Can you explain why the sky is blue, but in a way that a 10-year-old would enjoy?
I need help brainstorming names for my new sourdough bread starter. Can you give me 5 fun options?
What's a good movie to watch tonight if I'm in the mood for something thought-provoking?
I'm trying to learn Spanish. What's the single best piece of advice you'd give a beginner?
What are your thoughts on remote work versus office work?
I feel like I never have enough time. What's one productivity hack you'd recommend?
Tell me something surprising about a common animal.
What should I cook for dinner? I have chicken, garlic, lemon, and pasta.
I'm starting a garden for the first time. Where should I begin?
What's the difference between being introverted and being shy?
I just got promoted! How should I celebrate?
Can you help me write a short thank-you note to my mentor? They helped me get my first job.
What's something most people get wrong about sleep?
I want to start journaling. Do you have tips for making it stick?
My friend says cats are smarter than dogs. What do you think?
I need a fun icebreaker question for a team meeting of 8 people.
What's a good book for someone who doesn't usually read much?
I've been thinking a lot about whether to move cities for a job opportunity. How do I decide?
What do you think is the most important invention of the 20th century?
I want to get into hiking. What should a beginner pack for their first trail?
How do I politely tell a coworker that their music is too loud without causing awkwardness?
